allow_duplicates_description: Previously viewed clips will be allowed back into the queue when resubmitted.
auto_mod_description: When a submitter has their chat message deleted, has been timed out, or has been banned, the clip(s) they submitted will be removed. This is only valid for integration sources that support auto moderation.

match.lengthPlural=one: Are you sure you want to clear {length} log?
match.lengthPlural=other: Are you sure you want to clear {length} logs?

command_clear: Remove all clips in the queue.
command_prefix_description: The prefix to use for all chat commands. Commands must start with the prefix otherwise they will be ignored by the application.
command_remove_by_integration: Remove clips that came from a given integration.
command_remove_by_submitter: Remove clips sent by the submitter.
command_reset_cache: Reset all values cached by integrations.

match.lengthPlural=one: Are you sure you want to delete {length} clip from the history?
match.lengthPlural=other: Are you sure you want to delete {length} clips from the history?

feature_commands_description: Moderators of the channel can use chat commands to interact directly with the queue.
feature_connect_description: Log in to automatically connect to your chat. Clips submitted by users in chat will be queued.
feature_duplicate_prevent_description: Duplicate clips will not make it into the queue. This includes clips watched during previous sessions.
feature_integrations_description: Integrates with various other services, all configurable via the settings.
feature_moderation_description: Moderation performed in chat will effect the clips submitted by those users.
feature_popularity_description: Clips being repeately submitted by many users will rise up in the queue allowing it to be viewed sooner.
logger_level_description: The minimum log level to capture. Higher level logs will also be captured. Lower log levels could cause the application to slow down due to the quantity of logging.
logger_size_limit_description: The maximum number of logs to store. When the limit is reached, the oldest logs will be removed first.
no_clip_selected_description: Select an upcoming clip to begin playback.
no_clips_upcoming_description: Submit links in the chat to have them added to the upcoming clips.
purge_history_confirm: Are you sure you want to purge all clips from the history?
purge_history_description: Purge all clips previously viewed allowing them to be resubmitted.
reset_cache_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all caches generated by the integrations?
reset_cache_description: Integrations may cache items to prevent duplicate fetching of details. Clear all values integrations may have cached.
reset_settings_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to the default values?
reset_settings_description: Reset settings back to their initial values.
size_limit_description: The maximum number of clips allowed in the queue. Leave empty for no limit. After which no new clips will be allowed. If the clip is already in the queue and is submitted by a new submitter that will still be tracked.
unsupported_clip_description: Unable to start playback for the current clip. Attempt to re-add the clip.
